history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A person wearing a black hoodie is taking a mirror selfie. The hoodie has a graphic design on the back featuring a bull's skull, playing card suits (spades, hearts, diamonds, clubs), and text that appears to be in a distressed, vintage font. Some of the text is in reverse due to the mirror reflection. The person is holding a black smartphone in their right hand, and a silver ring is visible on their index finger. The background is a plain wall, with a black, ribbed heater or fan unit and a dark, spherical object to the right of the person. The lighting is dim and appears to be coming from the front, casting soft shadows. The overall color palette is muted, dominated by blacks, grays, and whites, with a warm, brownish tone reflecting from the wall or ceiling in the mirror. The mood is casual and slightly edgy, typical of a personal selfie.
